html:
Exclusive to:

“Digs up a tile and turns it into Farm Soil.”

-

The Garden Digamajig is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It can be crafted at the Science Machine under the Food tab with three Boards, two Rope, and two Flint.

The Garden Digamajig can be deployed as a structure to plow the ground into a farm soil in order to cultivate Farm Plants and Weeds. It has 4 uses.

Structure

The Garden Digamajig can be deployed as a structure to automatically plow a surface of 1 tile under it in 15 seconds into a farm soil in order to cultivate Farm Plants and Weeds. It also spawns 2-4 Garden Detritus and becomes a Garden Digamajig item once again with 1 use taken away. It has 4 uses.

Trivia

  • The Garden Digamajig was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
  • When it was first implemented, it was known as the "Garden Rigamajig". It was later renamed to Garden Digamajig in the Waterlogged update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
“I'd better find a good spot for my garden before I use it.”
–Wilson
“Guess I better find a dumb spot to plant some dumb plants.”
–Willow
“Will make garden full of fruits and veggies for Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“I suppose I must find a place for the garden.”
–Wendy
“A RUDIMENTARY TERRAFORMER”
–WX-78
“I'd best find a suitable spot for my garden.”
–Wickerbottom
“Where should we put the garden, Luce?”
–Woodie
“Some kind of farming implement? I've no interest in such things.”
–Maxwell
“A feröciöus weapön against untamed söil.”
–Wigfrid
“We'll find a good spot for the garden.”
–Webber
“Now, where to start the garden...”
–Warly
“Where will friends live?”
–Wormwood
“This gizmo will get us gardening in no time flat!”
–Winona
“All work and no play makes for one unhappy imp.”
–Wortox
“Scale-less use it to make "guard-in."”
–Wurt
“Want to help me find a good place for the garden, Woby?”
–Walter
“Might as well get this started.”
–Wanda
“Digs up a tile and turns it into Farm Soil.”
-
The Garden Digamajig is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them update. It can be crafted at the Science Machine under the Food tab with three Boards, two Rope, and two Flint.
The Garden Digamajig can be deployed as a structure to plow the ground into a farm soil in order to cultivate Farm Plants and Weeds. It has 4 uses.

Object Info

Source

"farm_plow"
“A convenient plot device.”
–Wilson
“Yeah, fight that ground!”
–Willow
“It is doing a mighty job!”
–Wolfgang
“It's fighting against the ground.”
–Wendy
“YES MY BRETHREN! BEND THE VERY EARTH TO YOUR WILL!”
–WX-78
“How very efficient!”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it's got things under control.”
–Woodie
“Thankfully it seems capable of doing the work itself.”
–Maxwell
“I claim this söil för the garden!”
–Wigfrid
“Yay! We're making a garden!”
–Webber
“What a handy machine!”
–Warly
“Make ground soft and nice”
–Wormwood
“Now that's handy!”
–Winona
“Plowing a plot for picky plants.”
–Wortox
“It fighting the dirt!”
–Wurt
“Hey, farming doesn't seem too hard!”
–Walter
“It's so much faster than digging everything up by hand!”
–Wanda
The Garden Digamajig can be deployed as a structure to automatically plow a surface of 1 tile under it in 15 seconds into a farm soil in order to cultivate Farm Plants and Weeds. It also spawns 2-4 Garden Detritus and becomes a Garden Digamajig item once again with 1 use taken away. It has 4 uses.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Garden Digamajig was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
When it was first implemented, it was known as the "Garden Rigamajig". It was later renamed to Garden Digamajig in the Waterlogged update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Garden Digamajig là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật Return of Them. Nó có thể được chế tạo tại Máy Khoa học trong tab Thực phẩm với ba Ván ép , hai Dây thừng và hai Đá lửa .

The '''Garden Digamajig''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]'' update. It can be crafted at the [[Science Machine]] under the Food tab with three [[Boards]], two [[Rope]], and two [[Flint]].

The Garden Digamajig can be deployed as a structure to plow the ground into a farm soil in order to cultivate [[Farm Plant]]s and [[Weeds]]. It has 4 uses.
{{Clear}}

The Garden Digamajig can be deployed as a structure to automatically plow a surface of 1 tile under it in 15 seconds into a farm soil in order to cultivate [[Farm Plant]]s and [[Weeds]]. It also spawns 2-4 [[Garden Detritus]] and becomes a Garden Digamajig item once again with 1 use taken away. It has 4 uses.  
{{Clear}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Garden Digamajig was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Reap What You Sow|Reap What You Sow]]'' update.
* When it was first implemented, it was known as the "Garden Rigamajig". It was later renamed to Garden Digamajig in the ''[[Don't Starve Together/Version History#Waterlogged Beta .28since July 26.2C 2021.29|Waterlogged]]'' update.
